case_title: GEORGE DAVIS VS. 255 WOODSIDE HOUSING ASSOCIATES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $992.00 FILED BY DAVIS, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT 255 WOODSIDE HOUSING ASSOCIATES BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>);REMARKS: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER SERVED TO DELPHINE SHERMAN - CFO. SERVED JAN-12-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, GEORGE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>); REMARKS: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER SERVED TO DELPHINE SHERMAN - CFO. SERVED JAN-12-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 255 WOODSIDE HOUSING ASSOCIATES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF GEORGE DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS 255 WOODSIDE HOUSING ASSOCIATES AND BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 255 WOODSIDE HOUSING ASSOCIATES BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION $402.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $402.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
